news.summary: In Lexington, Kentucky, local fiber internet provider Kinetic has confirmed its sponsorship of the post-game fireworks display taking place after the July 5 match between the Lexington Legends and the Southern Maryland Blue Crabs. Susan Schraibman, the president of Kentucky Operations at Kinetic, expressed enthusiasm for backing the fireworks show, considering it as a fitting way to celebrate the community and country during this special weekend.
news.headline: Local fiber internet provider Kinetic sponsors post-game fireworks at Lexington Legends Park on July 5 against Southern Maryland Blue Crabs. President Susan Schraibman excited to celebrate community and country.

news.summary: Dominion Energy (NYSE: D) will conduct its Q2 2025 earnings call at 10 a.m. ET on August 1, 2025. This session is crucial for investors and stakeholders, where management will cover recent financial outcomes. You can access the live webcast of the call with slides and financial data on investors.dominionenergy.com. Alternatively, you can join via phone.
news.headline: Dominion Energy will host Q2 2025 earnings call on August 1, 2025 at 10 a.m. ET. Webcast available at investors.dominionenergy.com.

news.summary: The increased number of businesses incorporating Ethereum into their treasuries and the faster pace of adoption of Ethereum in traditional finance could potentially drive the price of Ether to $2,800.

news.summary: A company based in Arlington, Virginia, Venture Global, recently revealed the completion of a significant financial transaction. The company closed a whopping $4 billion Senior Secured Notes offering through its subsidiary, Venture Global Plaquemines LNG, LLC.
news.headline: Venture Global closes $4B senior secured notes issued by Plaquemines LNG, LLC, based in Virginia.

news.summary: Webull Corporation (Nasdaq: BULL) based in St. Petersburg, Florida, has revealed plans to strategically utilize capital for significant growth endeavors. As the owner of the Webull online investment platform, the company aims to enhance its operations through targeted investments. This announcement was made on July 3, 2025.
news.headline: Webull secures $1 billion equity agreement for growth initiatives. Nasdaq: BULL. St. Petersburg, July 3, 2025.

news.summary: On July 3, 2025, Cboe Global Markets, Inc. (Cboe: CBOE), a prominent derivatives and securities exchange network, released its trading volume data for June. The company announced statistics encompassing its various business lines worldwide. Additionally, Cboe provided insights into selected revenue per contract and net revenue figures for the period.
news.headline: Cboe Global Markets reports June 2025 trading volume statistics, includes guidance on revenue per contract.

news.summary: On July 3, 2025 in Pittsburgh, an inventor from Warren, Ontario, Canada shared insights on their innovative approach to log home construction. This individual, working in log home restoration, believed there was room for improvement in the sector. As a result, they created the ULTIMATE LOG HOME, introducing a superior and environmentally friendly design. This invention is anticipated to revolutionize the log home building industry with its unique features and functionality.
news.headline: Inventor from Ontario creates ULTIMATE LOG HOME with new eco-friendly material for construction.

Liverpool footballer Diogo Jota and his brother, Andre Silva, were killed in a single-car crash near Zamora, Spain, police said Thursday. Jota, a Portuguese international, was 28. Silva was 26.

news.summary: Senator Cynthia Lummis (R-WY) recently introduced a comprehensive digital asset tax reform bill with the aim of modernizing the taxation of cryptocurrencies in the United States. The bill, unveiled on July 3rd, addresses various longstanding tax issues within the crypto industry. Key provisions include a $300 de minimis exemption for small transactions, a more practical approach to taxing mining and staking activities, and achieving parity between digital assets and traditional financial instruments. Lummis emphasized the importance of adapting the tax code to support the digital economy without imposing undue burdens on digital asset users. The bill is stated to be fully funded and is intended to streamline taxation processes for these assets.
news.headline: Senator Cynthia Lummis introduces a digital asset tax reform bill, offering a $300 de minimis exemption for small transactions and clarifying tax treatment for mining and staking. The legislation aims to modernize crypto taxation in the US.

news.summary: U.S. stock markets experienced significant gains on Thursday, reaching new all-time highs following positive labor market statistics just before the July 4 holiday. The S&P 500 was approaching 6,300 points, the Nasdaq 100 rose to 22,860 points, and the Dow Jones Industrial Average neared 44,900 points - close to its peak in January. Small caps also joined the upward trend, with the Russell 2000 increasing by almost 1%. Investor confidence was boosted by the June nonfarm payrolls report, which revealed the addition of 147,000 jobs to the U.S. economy, surpassing expectations of 110,000 jobs. This data helped alleviate concerns raised by a weak private payroll report released the previous day. Particularly, tech stocks excelled, with the combined market capitalization of the "Magnificent Seven" hitting $18.1 trillion. NVIDIA Corp. (NASDAQ: NVDA) notably...
news.headline: Wall Street hits new highs on strong labor data ahead of July 4. S&P 500 approaching 6,300, Nasdaq 100 at 22,860, Dow Jones near 44,900. Magnificent Seven tech stocks top $18 trillion market cap. Nonfarm payrolls show U.S. added 147,000 jobs in June.

news.summary: Following a recent policy change by Singapore's Monetary Authority, all cryptocurrency firms operating in the country are mandated to register. This new requirement led to the granting of a license to operate in Singapore.
news.headline: Bitstamp received a license from MAS to operate in Singapore following a new policy requiring all crypto firms in the country to register.

news.summary: A technology company based in San Jose, California, Cadence (Nasdaq: CDNS) has announced that it will be hosting a webcast to present its financial results for the second quarter of 2025. The event is scheduled to take place on Monday, July 28, 2025. Cadence is a publicly traded company listed on the Nasdaq under the ticker symbol CDNS. This webcast will provide stakeholders and investors insight into the company's performance and financial standing for the specified quarter.
news.headline: Cadence (Nasdaq: CDNS) to host Q2 2025 financial results webcast on July 28, 2025 from San Jose.

news.summary: On July 3rd, 2025, BCC Research unveiled its "2024 Packaging Research Review," showcasing remarkable progress in sustainable packaging, healthcare packaging, and sustainable plastic packaging sectors. The highlights include the following projections: Sustainable Packaging Global Markets are anticipated to surge from $278.1 billion in 2023 to $391.1 billion by 2029, with a CAGR of 6.0%. Plastics for Healthcare Packaging are expected to grow from $32.1 billion in 2023 to $46.1 billion by 2028, indicating a CAGR of 7.5%. Sustainable Plastic Packaging Global Markets are projected to rise from $81.6 billion in 2023 to $122.4 billion by 2029, via an intermediary forecast of $86.6 billion in 2024, demonstrating a CAGR of 7.2%. The research encompasses crucial technological advancements and market expansion focusing on sustainable packaging methods that reduce environmental impact through the use of recycled or biodegradable materials. The comprehensive story is accessible on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: "BCC Research's 2024 Packaging Review: Sustainable packaging market to hit $391.1B by 2029, CAGR of 6.0%."
35 counterparties take $214.665 bln at Fed Reverse Repo Operation

news.summary: On July 3, 2025, 1RT Acquisition Corp. declared the completion of its IPO, offering a total of 17,250,000 units, with an additional 2,250,000 units issued due to the underwriters exercising their full over-allotment option.
news.headline: 1RT Acquisition Corp. completes $172.5 million IPO with 17.25 million units, including 2.25 million from underwriter's allotment.

news.summary: In Pittsburgh on July 3, 2025, an inventor from Jacksonville, Florida shared his inspiration for creating the BURPEE EXERCISE MACHINE. The inventor aimed to simplify burpees and abdominal exercises through this innovation. This machine, designed with a focus on convenience and efficiency, is set to revolutionize workout routines.
news.headline: Inventor from Jacksonville, Florida created the BURPEE EXERCISE MACHINE for easier burpees and ab exercises.

news.summary: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced a noticeable increase following a robust June jobs report. This growth resulted in the Dow rallying by 300 points amidst discussions of a more hawkish stance from the Federal Reserve. Notably, stocks such as Nvidia and Palantir saw significant gains during this session. Additionally, four stocks broke out during today's trading.
news.headline: Dow Jones up 300 points amid strong jobs report. Nvidia and Palantir surge. Four stocks break out.

news.summary: Treetop Companies, a private real estate investment firm expanding its industrial presence, has recently purchased the Inducon Business Park in Buffalo, NY. The purchase includes a 12-building light industrial campus spanning 293,962 square feet near the Buffalo Niagara International Airport. The acquisition from Time Equities, Inc. was facilitated by Joe Hill of CBRE. The park, located in Williamsville, NY, provides convenient access to I-90 and is in close proximity to 167 million.
news.headline: Treetop Companies buys Inducon Business Park in Williamsville, NY from Time Equities, includes 12 buildings spanning 293,962 sq ft.

news.summary: In Panama City, Florida, on July 3, 2025, the Hope Regional Cancer Center secured its fourth consecutive complete accreditation from the American College of Radiology within Radiation Oncology. This accreditation sets the Center apart as the sole one in Bay County to achieve this recognition.
news.headline: Hope Regional Cancer Center in Panama City, Fla., awarded fourth straight ACR accreditation in Radiation Oncology.

news.summary: Starting on July 5th, individuals around the globe will have access to real-time content, celebrity well-wishes, stories, and media content in honor of His Holiness the 14th Dalai Lama. The celebration, set to occur on July 6th, is expected to bring together millions of people worldwide to commemorate the Dalai Lama's legacy of peace, compassion, and moral bravery.
news.headline: Global celebration of Dalai Lama's 90th birthday on July 6 with millions of people, highlighting compassion and peace.

news.summary: Tel Aviv, Israel-based REE Automotive Ltd. (Nasdaq: REE), a company specializing in software-defined vehicle technology, recently disclosed receiving a letter from Nasdaq. The letter highlighted that REE is not meeting the Nasdaq Rule 5450(a)(1) requirement due to its Class A ordinary shares trading below $1.00 per share consecutively for 30 business days from May 15, 2025, to June 27, 2025. This notification indicates a compliance issue that REE Automotive needs to address promptly.
news.headline: REE Automotive received Nasdaq notification for not meeting minimum bid price rule of $1.00 for 30 days.
OPEC+ discussing 411k barrel hike for August - Delegates.

news.summary: For Bitcoin to have a chance at reaching a new all-time high above $111,980, it is crucial for the bulls to ensure the price remains above $109,000.
news.headline: Bitcoin’s $109,000 hold shows bullish market control. New highs likely if price remains above this level.

news.summary: On July 1, 2025, Taysha Gene Therapies, Inc. (Nasdaq: TSHA) announced that two new employees were granted stock options to buy 30,000 shares of the company's common stock under the 2023 Inducement Plan. The company focuses on developing gene therapies for severe monogenic diseases of the central nervous system. The Compensation Committee of Taysha's Board of Directors approved this grant as part of the employees' employment agreements to comply with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).
news.headline: Taysha Gene Therapies granted 30,000 shares' options to 2 new employees on July 1, 2025 under Nasdaq Rule 5635(c)(4).

news.summary: FREMONT, California - Actelis Networks, Inc. (NASDAQ: ASNS) disclosed the completion of a private placement offering under Nasdaq rules. The transaction involved the issuance and sale of 1,626,019 common stock shares, Series A-3 warrants for up to 1,626,019 common stock shares, and short-term Series A-4 warrants for up to 3,252,038 common stock shares, all priced at $0.615 per share. Actelis Networks specializes in cyber-resilient networking solutions for IoT and broadband applications. The offering marked a significant development for the Company in the market.
news.headline: Actelis Networks closed private placement under Nasdaq rules, selling 1,626,019 shares at $0.615 each.

news.summary: Fate Therapeutics, Inc. announced on July 2, 2025, the granting of non-qualified stock options to one new non-executive employee for 30,000 shares at an exercise price of $1.12 per share, and restricted stock units (RSUs) amounting to 37,900 shares to two new non-executive employees. These grants, approved by the Compensation Committee, were given under the Company’s Amended and Restated Inducement Equity Plan as an inducement for the new hires, in compliance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4). The options will vest over four years, with 25% vesting after one year and the rest vesting monthly over thirty-six months, contingent on continued employment. The RSUs will also vest over four years, with 25% vesting annually, dependent on continued employment with the Company.
news.headline: Fate Therapeutics granted 30,000 stock options and 37,900 RSUs to newly-hired employees on July 2, 2025, under Nasdaq rule.

news.summary: In anticipation of critical U.S.-China trade discussions over the weekend, President Trump indicated that an "80% Tariff appears appropriate." Despite this tough stance, the S&P 500 experienced a rise as Wall Street remained optimistic. This development comes as part of the ongoing U.S.-China Trade Talks, with Trump maintaining a firm position on tariffs but also showing some flexibility. The market responded positively to these developments, with the S&P 500 reflecting the investor sentiment.
news.headline: Trump takes tough tariff stance at 80%, but still flexible. S&P 500 rises as Wall Street remains optimistic ahead of US-China trade talks.

news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on May 16, 2025, HI-VIEW Resources Inc. (referred to as 'HI-VIEW' or the 'Company') disclosed plans to consolidate its common shares ("Shares") at an 8-old-for-1-new share ratio, a move that aims to streamline and strengthen its position. The Company's shares are traded on various platforms, including the Canadian Securities Exchange (CSE) under the ticker HVW, the OTCQB market with the ticker HVWRF, and the Frankfurt Stock Exchange (FSE) using the ticker B63. This consolidation approach signifies a strategic decision by HI-VIEW Resources Inc., reflecting its commitment to operational efficiency and enhancing shareholder value.
news.headline: Hi-View Resources plans 8-to-1 share consolidation, affecting common shares. Update from Vancouver, BC. (Numbers: CSE: HVW, OTCQB: HVWRF, FSE: B63)

news.summary: On May 28, 2025, in West Chester, Pennsylvania, a pharmaceutical company called Verrica Pharmaceuticals Inc. (Nasdaq: VRCA) shared that Jayson Rieger, PhD, MBA, the President and CEO, will be speaking at the Jefferies Global Healthcare Conference in New York City. Verrica focuses on developing treatments for skin conditions that need medical attention.
news.headline: Verrica Pharma CEO presents at Jefferies Healthcare Conference in NYC - May 28, 2025. (Nasdaq: VRCA) #dermatology #medications #skin_diseases.

news.summary: An equity swap led by the CEO of Alpha Modus has bolstered the company's balance sheet by $31 million, indicating a strong commitment to long-term growth and alignment with shareholders.
news.headline: Alpha Modus Holdings, Inc. will boost balance sheet by $31 million via CEO-led capital restructuring, supporting growth.
